title: pi-capture config
description: Per-repo configuration for the pi-capture extension (.pi/pi-capture.json)

backend.description: Which issue-tracking backend to use. Only 'linear-cli' is implemented in v0.1.

initiative.description: Linear initiative slug (the part after the last '-' in the initiative URL, e.g. '7f9450f97e50').

projectPattern.description: Pattern for current-quarter project names. {YY} = 2-digit year, {Q} = quarter (1-4), {XX} = prefix.

projectPrefix.description: The prefix token that replaces {XX} in projectPattern (e.g. 'BC' → '[BC] Y26 Q3').

techDebtMilestone.description: Name pattern for the rolling Tech Debt milestone. Same tokens as projectPattern.

labels.description: Mapping of semantic label kinds to the actual Linear label names configured in your workspace.

prompts.description: Paths to markdown files containing project-specific classifier instructions. Loaded and appended to every capture prompt. Paths are relative to the repo root.

policies.description: Controls what the async worker may do autonomously.

asyncMayCreateMilestone.description: When false (default), async capture NEVER creates milestones except the rolling Tech Debt one. Milestone proposals go into the issue body as a checklist item.

asyncMayStubSpec.description: When false (default), async capture NEVER creates spec stub files. Spec proposals go into the issue body as a checklist item.

asyncMayCreateLabels.description: When false (default), async capture NEVER creates new Linear labels. It uses only the labels listed in the 'labels' config.
